name: Black Softshell Turtle
populationEstimate: ~150 in temple ponds; possibly extinct in wild
conservationEfforts: Bayazid Bostami shrine in Bangladesh maintains a temple pond population. Turtle Survival Alliance coordinates conservation. Wild populations in the Brahmaputra system may still exist.
description: Considered sacred in Bangladesh where hundreds live in a shrine pond. Its conservation depends partly on religious protection — the only surviving populations are in temple ponds.
